brandHeadline: Bring knowledge, chat, and resources into one workspace
brandDescription: Keep the same local-first workbench context as the main product, with emphasis on stable retrieval, session resources, and predictable context flow.
entryChecklistDescription: Prepare materials first, move into chat, then verify references and context.
brandFeatureConversationDescription: Keep asking against the current resource context without losing the thread.
brandFeatureResourcesDescription: Keep uploads, versions, and indexing status inside one steady workflow.
brandFeatureReviewDescription: Review cited snippets, previews, and the next action after each answer.
controlledAccessDescription: Sign in with an initialized account to enter the unified workspace.
workspaceConsistencyDescription: The sign-in view keeps language, theme, and permission boundaries aligned with the main workspace.
aboutDescription: Learn how the workspace structures resources, permissions, and daily operation.
aboutAudienceDescription: Admins initialize the system, configure providers, and maintain resources. Regular users mainly browse resources, ask questions, and verify citations.
aboutWorkflowDescription: Uploads, chat, and citation checks stay in one workspace to reduce page hopping and context breaks.
aboutBoundaryDescription: After sign-in, each role only sees its allowed capabilities. Before sign-in, the page keeps language, theme, and guidance entry points predictable.
loginFailed: Login failed. Check your username and password, then try again.
changePasswordDescription: Update the current account password. This ends the current sign-in and requires you to sign in again.
changePasswordValidationError: Enter both the current password and the new password.
passwordLengthValidationError: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
changePasswordFailed: Failed to change password. Try again later.
changePasswordSuccessToast: Password updated. Please sign in again.
